subcodes.first_line: The decree of God, inscribed by the Finger of Power in His Hidden Book, hath been made manifest. This is the Day wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر حکم الله الذی رقم باصبع القدره فی کتابه المکنون هذا یوم فیه ام
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God
